title: Policy: Modify Policy Settings
scenario: Policy settings applied via Lens Cloud appear locked/greyed out in Poly Studio Mobile app device settings with a dialog when user attempts to modify them
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Apply a policy via Lens Cloud that restricts or locks specific settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
5. Return to the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Device Settings → Audio Settings.
6. Observe the affected settings (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) — they should appear locked or greyed out.
7. Tap on one of the locked/greyed-out settings to attempt to modify it.
8. Observe the dialog that appears, informing the user that the setting is managed by an IT policy.
expected: The affected settings appear locked/greyed out in the device settings page, and a dialog appears when the user attempts to modify them, indicating the setting is managed by an IT policy.
